channel.title: Registry of Shielded Artworks Blog
channel.description: Thesis-derived essays on cultural entropy, regenerative architecture, RSA, and ALMA.

item.title: Cultural Entropy: Why Artist Legacies Decay by Default
item.description: Why posthumous drift is structural and why persistence requires designed coordination systems.

item.title: The Coordination Tax: Verification Costs as Hidden Devaluation
item.description: How verification burden compounds across institutions, scholarship, and markets.

item.title: From Advocacy to Architecture: Designing for Persistence
item.description: Why durable process design matters more than episodic attention campaigns.

item.title: A Boundary-Condition Case: The ERL Estate Under Maximal Constraint
item.description: What a worst-case estate configuration reveals about design feasibility and limits.

item.title: RSA on Zcash: Integrity with Selective Disclosure
item.description: Why shielded Layer 1 infrastructure is framed as a stewardship integrity substrate.

item.title: ALMA and Polycentric Governance: Adoption Without Centralization
item.description: How polycentric coordination enables standards diffusion while preserving estate sovereignty.
